title: Slow Cooked Turkish Avocado Bowl
description: A hearty, comforting, and refreshing solo dinner featuring the flavors of Turkey, with a creamy avocado topping.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken or vegetable broth, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid has reduced and the flavors have melded together.
Stir in the lemon juice, and season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
Spoon the mixture into bowls and top each serving with sliced avocado, diced to preference.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
